notes: Returnable pass, must be picked up and returned to Brookline Village location. Benefits text is only museum description — no party-size or admission price stated. No passes available at this time.
raw: (781) 326-1770 Hale Reservation's ponds, trails, plants, animals, birds, fish, and insects spark curiosity. Lifelong learners enjoy limitless opportunities for growth and discovery here, whether they're overcoming a fear of heights on the challenge course or spying a family of deer along a trail. This pass must be reserved through the library's online catalog . The pass must be picked up and returned to the library's Brookline Village location. No passes are available at this time.
